roundup.title: Fable 5 Returns, Gemini Omni Flash Ships
roundup.subtitle: Claude Fable 5 回归，Gemini 新图像视频模型发布
headline: @AnthropicAI 与 @cursor_ai 共同确认 Claude Fable 5 今日全球重新上线，新增网络安全分类器后恢复供应。@OpenRouter 同步恢复接入，部分 coding 请求暂时回退至 Opus 4.8。
@GoogleAIStudio 同时推出 Nano Banana 2 Lite 与 Gemini Omni Flash，前者 4 秒出图仅 $0.034/1K 分辨率，后者原生支持视频生成与自然语言编辑。@GoogleAI 强调两者均为当前最快、最低成本的多模态模型。
@github 与 @runwayml 分别发布自定义 Agent 与 Agent Skills，支持 Markdown 定义 guardrails 和营销自动化 workflow。@figma 同步展示 Figma Agent 技能集成，标志 agent 产品进入实用阶段。
@HuggingPapers 报道 WeChat SkillHone 在 GAIA 基准上领先商业 deep-research agent 15.8 分，证明动态技能演化路径可行。@DrJimFan 则展示 ASPIRE 机器人自进化系统，实现 100 任务持续学习。

deepDives.title: Claude Fable 5 全球重新上线
deepDives.summary: Anthropic 在与美国政府沟通后重新部署 Fable 5，新增网络安全防护。

facts.text: Fable 5 今日起在 Cursor、OpenRouter 等平台恢复可用
facts.quote: Claude Fable 5 will be available again globally tomorrow

facts.text: 新增分类器用于阻断网络安全滥用请求
facts.quote: new set of classifiers to target and block more cybersecurity misuse

bullish.text: Fable 5 leads all models on CursorBench

deepDives.title: Gemini Nano Banana 2 Lite 与 Omni Flash 发布
deepDives.summary: Google 发布两款低成本高速度多模态模型，面向开发者流水线。

facts.text: Nano Banana 2 Lite 文本生成图像 4 秒完成
facts.quote: delivers text-to-image outputs in 4 seconds at just $0.034 per 1K-resolution image

facts.text: Gemini Omni Flash 支持视频生成与自然语言编辑
facts.quote: enables you to refine videos using natural language

bullish.text: fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini Image model yet

bullets.text: GitHub Copilot CLI 支持 Markdown 自定义 Agent 角色与 guardrails
Runway 推出 Agent Skills 一键生成广告营销内容
OpenWiki 两天内获 1.7k GitHub stars，支持多源集成
GPT-5.6 30 小时已超越 Claude Opus 64 小时加速记录
vLLM Qwen3-Omni 首音频延迟 0.6s，吞吐提升 5.4x
Sakana Fast-weight Product Key Memory 获 ICML 2026 口头报告
Allen AI FlexOlmo 架构适配轻量化丹麦基础模型
CursorBench 显示 Fable 5 仍为最强 coding 模型
Ollama Gemma 4 在 Apple Silicon 上提速近 90%

topTweets.author: @AnthropicAI
topTweets.text: Claude Fable 5 今日全球重新上线，新增网络安全分类器

topTweets.text: Nano Banana 2 Lite 4 秒出图，价格低至 $0.034/1K
topTweets.whyItMatters: 刷新图像模型速度与成本基准

topTweets.author: @cursor_ai
topTweets.text: Fable 5 重回 Cursor，CursorBench 排名第一
topTweets.whyItMatters: 最新 coding 模型性能排序

topTweets.author: @github
topTweets.text: GitHub Copilot CLI 支持 Markdown 自定义 Agent
topTweets.whyItMatters: 企业级 agent 工作流落地

topTweets.author: @HuggingPapers
topTweets.text: SkillHone 在 GAIA 基准领先 15.8 分
topTweets.whyItMatters: 动态技能演化新范式验证

takeaways: Fable 5 回归后 coding agent 工具链需重新评估成本与安全策略。
Gemini 新模型将图像/视频生成成本压至毫秒级，适合高频开发者流水线。
Agent Skills 与自定义 guardrails 成为下一阶段产品标配，关注 Markdown 定义规范。
多模态 prompting 与 SkillHone 动态演化是当前 agent 性能提升最快路径。

items.author: @HuggingPapers
items.text: WeChat AI's SkillHone: agent skills that remember why they changed. Instead of static prompts, it evolves skills with a persistent decision history. Result: +15.8 points over the leading commercial deep-research agent on GAIA.
items.whyItMatters: SkillHone 动态演化 Agent 技能，GAIA 基准提升 15.8 分。

items.author: @kimmonismus
items.text: First reports about GPT-5.6; after 30 hours it already surpassed the speedup of Claude Opus’ 64-hour run. Less brute-force, more persistent research.
items.whyItMatters: GPT-5.6 早期 benchmark 信号，agent 优化方向

items.author: @omarsar0
items.text: Multimodal prompting is clearly the future. How we interact with agents is evolving. I share a bit of how I implemented multimodal prompting for my coding agents.
items.whyItMatters: coding agent 多模态 prompting 实践分享

items.author: @code
items.text: 🚀 Build and test web apps right in the browser with @code! Pages can now request camera, location, and device access with per-site approval prompts. The Agents window (Preview) also introduces guided onboarding tours to help you get started faster.
items.whyItMatters: VS Code 新增 Agent 多会话管理和沙箱终端，提升 AI 编码工作流效率。

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: "Fast-weight Product Key Memory" will be presented as an oral paper at the Continual Adaptation at Scale: Towards Sustainable AI Workshop at #ICML2026. Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.00671 ... reaches ~75% 5-needle NIAH accuracy at 128K context length.
items.whyItMatters: Sakana 新内存机制支持 128K 上下文与快速领域适应，ICML 口头报告。

items.author: @github
items.text:
🆕 Custom agents in GitHub Copilot CLI.
Define roles, tools, and guardrails in Markdown, then run consistent workflows for security audits, release notes, incident response, and more.
items.whyItMatters: GitHub Copilot CLI 支持自定义 Agent

items.author: @emollick
items.text: We are leaving the Old Code Age, the Paleocodic, the artisinal code era... Six months is a long time ago in vibecoded frontend designs.
items.whyItMatters: AI编码时代已至，手工编码成历史

items.author: @anemll
items.text: Interesting arch for @NVidia DGX Station with HBM+DDR5. I suspect inference setup might be close to SSD streaming....
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA DGX Station 内存架构对本地推理性能的影响分析。

items.author: @che_shr_cat
items.text: 9/ Read my full technical breakdown here: https://arxiviq.substack.com/p/lacuna-a-research-map-for-machine Check out the paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26246
items.whyItMatters: Lacuna预计算ML证据图，agent成本降75%，benchmark显著提升

items.author: @business
items.text: After losing out big on the global AI rally, Indian equities are regaining the attention of investors seeking to weather the latest market turbulence
items.whyItMatters: AI热潮后印度股市重新获关注，市场轮动信号

items.author: @idavidrein
items.text: Typically computer security assumes your attacker doesn't start with a shell on your machine—in fact that's often the win condition. Security against potentially malicious AI agents is hard because by definition you've already given them read/write perms to most of your machine. My guess is we need totally new security
items.whyItMatters: 指出AI Agent安全需全新原语，对控制与对齐研究有直接意义。

items.author: @hxiao
items.text: <think>Ha! a cute smart test.</think> 🫡
items.whyItMatters: GLM模型通过特定智能测试的简短点评，指向新evals信号。

items.author: @shannholmberg
items.text: what is Claude Ultracode, and why do people pair it with Fable 5... ultracode runs it differently: fans out a fleet of agents in parallel
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code 新模式 + Fable 5 实战用法，coding agent 效率提升

items.author: @signulll
items.text: fable, i think, likely marks the end of software engineering as we knew it. it’s prolly the penultimate chapter, if not the end of that entire story.
items.whyItMatters: Fable 模型对软件工程范式影响的强信号观点

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: Claude Fable 5 will be available again globally tomorrow. After a series of productive conversations with the US government, we're redeploying the model with a new set of classifiers to target and block more cybersecurity tasks...
items.whyItMatters: Fable 5 重新上线，影响 coding/agent 使用与安全策略

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: Qwen3-Omni serving optimization: replicate speech stages, first audio ~0.6s, 5.4x throughput. Full stack breakdown.
items.whyItMatters: 多模态实时 serving 性能优化案例

items.author: @hwchase17
items.text: OpenWiki up to 1.7k GitHub stars in two days. Most common ask it to make it more general purpose (not just coding). What sources do people want to see? Notion? GMail? Slack? GDrive? Internet search? Other?

items.author: @reach_vb
items.text: GPT 5.5 Instant is actually pretty goated and in many ways class apart from the rest, IMHO! https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-5-instant/

items.author: @NousResearch
items.text: Easiest way to start is downloading the Desktop app from https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/
items.whyItMatters: Nous 发布 Hermes Agent 桌面应用，便于本地使用

items.author: @SemiAnalysis_
items.text: So a "harness" is really a context orchestration tool. Every request body it builds typically has the same three parts: System Prompt, Tool Definitions, Messages... the real power is still in the models themselves.
items.whyItMatters: 深入解析 Agent harness 架构本质

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: We’re shipping two major updates... Introducing Nano Banana 2 Lite: Our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini Image model yet... Gemini Omni Flash in Public Preview: Our natively multimodal model for cost-efficient video generation...
items.whyItMatters: 新 Gemini 图像/视频模型发布，速度与成本优化显著

items.author: @fal
items.text: 3D → 4K Video · Blender + Seedance 4k... Convert 3D, CG, or game renders into photorealistic, film-quality footage.
items.whyItMatters: fal 平台集成 Seedance，支持 3D 到高质视频生成

items.author: @levie
items.text: The battle in AI is shaping up to be a battle for context. Everything in AI is about making sure that agents are effective as possible... The applied AI layer has a lot more value than just being an LLM wrapper.
items.whyItMatters: 阐述企业级 Agent 上下文与部署价值，指导实际落地。

items.author: @julien_c
items.text: True
items.whyItMatters: Hugging Face CTO 认可 Qwen 27B 作为近期最佳开源模型。

items.author: @willccbb
items.text: eval awareness is always present because model identity is largely shaped via RL environments which are the same thing as evals
items.whyItMatters: RL 环境即 eval，模型身份塑造机制对基准测试影响。

items.author: @__tinygrad__
items.text: AMD is doing far better now. They are finally putting real resources into software and the stack is leaps and bounds better than it was 3 years ago (try it!).

items.text: RubricRobustness: Evaluating the Sensitivity of Rubrics-Based Benchmarks to Simple Perturbations https://openreview.net/challenge?redirect=%2Fforum%3Fid%3D2Y3I3i4hoP

items.whyItMatters: 多轮 Agent 模仿学习新方法，autonomous workflow 进展

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: OpenWiki is the easiest way to increase your coding agent performance... runs on open models (GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, etc)

items.author: @claudeai
items.text: Announcing Built with Claude: Life Sciences, a global virtual hackathon. Join us and @GladstoneInst for a week of researching and building with Claude Science and Claude Code, with a prize pool of $100k in credits.
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic 举办生命科学黑客松，$100k 额度激励

items.author: @allen_ai
items.text: The Danish Foundation Models (DFM) project is adapting our modular FlexOlmo architecture into a lighter-weight system that runs on commodity hardware—putting collaborative model building within reach of smaller research groups & organizations.
items.whyItMatters: 模块化模型 FlexOlmo 轻量化开源适配

items.author: @lvwerra
items.text: Can agents collaborate to gather *all* information on a research topic... they processed 200+ papers... wrote 45 articles with 75k words... Join with your agents:
items.whyItMatters: 展示多 Agent 协作研究 wiki 的实际进展与规模。

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: Introducing Agent Skills. Build an ad campaign, create a commercial, localize your ads and more with a simple command... Scale your marketing.
items.whyItMatters: Runway 新 Agent Skills 发布，支持营销自动化 workflow。

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: Today I deleted PagedAttention from vLLM... NASA's Johnson Space Center is testing RamaLama to power a medical AI assistant for deep space missions.
items.whyItMatters: vLLM 重大改动 + 边缘开源 AI 航天应用案例。

items.author: @dzhng
items.text: Frontier models has gotten so good at one shotting web apps that it's no longer in my personal benchmarks. Instead, one of my bench now involves loop building a WebGPU water renderer, from scratch.
items.whyItMatters: 前沿模型基准转向复杂渲染任务，Claude/Fable Codex对比

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: DeepSeek effect https://t.co/qt0sRctv0i
items.whyItMatters: DeepSeek 使用开源 perfectblend 数据集训练新 drafter，验证数据集价值。

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: We are licensing Laguna XS 2.1 under OpenMDW-1.1. We are making this change to support open model distribution for the community.
items.whyItMatters: Poolside 采用 NVIDIA/OpenMDW 许可框架，降低开源模型分发摩擦。

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: We’re working hard to release more capable models, and feedback from the community helps us make the next ones better. ... pool now supports OpenRouter login
items.whyItMatters: 发布 Laguna XS 2.1 及终端 coding agent pool，支持 OpenRouter。

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: Claude Fable 5 is available again in Cursor. It leads all models on CursorBench, but is the most expensive per task.
items.whyItMatters: CursorBench 最新模型排名，直接影响 coding 工具选择

items.author: @ollama
items.text: Gemma 4 is now nearly 90% faster on Apple Silicon with Ollama using MLX! The speedup comes from improved multi-token prediction (MTP), now on by default for Gemma 4.
items.whyItMatters: Ollama 使 Gemma 4 在 Apple Silicon 上提速近 90%

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text:
Claude Fable 5 from @Anthropic is back on OpenRouter!
Anthropic is redeploying it globally with new safeguards for cybersecurity misuse. Some coding and debugging requests may temporarily fall back to Opus 4.8 while classifiers are refined.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Fable 5 回归 OpenRouter，支持 coding

items.author: @DrJimFan
items.text: Introducing ASPIRE: a robot solving its 100th task... self-evolves and compounds indefinitely! ... open-source the full stack... up to ~10x cut in transfer learning tokens.
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA新机器人技能自进化系统，支持持续学习与跨 embodiment

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: As generative AI tools continue to evolve... SynthID watermarking... watermarked over 100 billion images... open-sourced our text watermarking technology...
items.whyItMatters: SynthID 水印技术扩展至多模态并开源，助力内容溯源

items.author: @figma
items.text: Here's how we use skills in the Figma agent https://www.figma.com/blog/got-skills-make-the-figma-agent-a-better-collaborator/
items.whyItMatters: Figma Agent 技能使用详解，提升 AI 协作能力

items.author: @Grad62304977
items.text: i mean even in the mimo paper isnt this still bullish on mix-RL? The SWE teacher seems equivalent to the mix with MOPD then spending more compute for the same performance. For math and IF it looks like if u combine the compute on the teacher and MOPD u could extrapolate to similar results, doesnt seem far fetched Also
items.whyItMatters: 讨论MIMO论文、mix-RL与Qwen3模型性能对比的最新洞见。

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: We’re introducing GeneBench-Pro, a research-level benchmark for a harder kind of AI progress: how well agents can navigate messy biological data...
items.whyItMatters: 新 agent benchmark，针对真实科研场景

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: Claude Sonnet 5 is now available in Perplexity for Pro and Max subscribers. You can also select it as an orchestrator model in Computer.
items.whyItMatters: Perplexity 集成 Claude Sonnet 5，提升用户模型选择

items.author: @GoogleResearch
items.text: Introducing TabFM, a foundation model designed specifically for tabular data classification & regression. This approach allows generation of high-quality predictions on previously unseen tables in a single forward pass.
items.whyItMatters: TabFM 零样本表格基础模型发布，适用于分类回归任务。

items.author: @lateinteraction
items.text: why aren’t retrieval people working on sparse attention, all the techniques look like poor man’s IR
items.whyItMatters: 讨论稀疏注意力与检索技术的结合潜力。

items.author: @levie
items.text: We've been running Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 5 through the Box AI Complex Work Eval... Sonnet 5 holds frontier-class quality on complex multi-step work.
items.whyItMatters: Sonnet 5 企业基准实测数据，供模型选型参考。

items.author: @steph_palazzolo
items.text: OpenAI engineers earlier this month developed an optimization that cut inference costs in half for models it was applied to. After the optimization was applied to logged-out ChatGPT traffic, it reduced the number of GPUs needed to power that traffic to a couple hundred.
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI 推理成本减半实测，GPU 需求大幅降低

items.author: @jeremyphoward
items.text: Vision. Then we can read papers, math texts, etc, and the model can see the figures and charts too.
items.whyItMatters: 强调多模态视觉对论文阅读与图表理解的重要性。

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text:
gemini omni flash is here: our high-quality, cost-efficient model for video generation and conversational editing
designed to support multimodal workflows, it enables you to refine videos using natural language and simple prompting
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 新视频生成模型，支持自然语言编辑

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text:
introducing nano banana 2 lite: our fastest, most cost-effective gemini image model yet
built for high-velocity developer pipelines, it delivers text-to-image outputs in 4 seconds at just $0.034 per 1K-resolution image
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 最快低成本图像模型发布

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: “Loop engineering” is a hot buzzphrase... I’d like to share my 3 key loops... for building 0-to-1 products. Agentic coding loop, Developer feedback loop, External feedback loop.
items.whyItMatters: 详解AI代理编码三大循环，指导0-1产品构建

items.author: @AIatMeta
items.text: We’re sharing the next major milestone... Brain2Qwerty v2... highest-performing end-to-end pipeline... releasing the full training code... partner releasing the v1 dataset.
items.whyItMatters: 脑机接口新突破，代码与数据集开源加速神经科学
